title: zkLend - Rekt
relevance_summary: Arithmetic manipulation using flash loans to exploit rounding errors in lending accumulator

prevention.rule: Block any tx that uses flash loans followed by a series of operations that manipulate a lending accumulator to an extreme value.
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN -> series of operations -> extreme value in lending accumulator

red_flags: manipulation of lending accumulator to extreme value
monitoring_rules: BLOCK any tx that uses flash loans followed by a series of operations that manipulate a lending accumulator to an extreme value.
summary: zkLend lost $9.57M due to an attacker exploiting rounding errors in their lending accumulator through a series of flash loan transactions. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for flash loans followed by operations that manipulate the lending accumulator to an extreme value.
